title: epidendrum chrysanthum
intro: Epidendrum chrysanthum, also known as the yellow orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum chrysanthum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the respiratory system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and ease respiratory discomfort.
